description_long: This rifle features a modern, tactical design with a predominantly black and dark gray body accented by striking red highlights. It has a bullpup configuration, with the magazine and action located behind the trigger, resulting in a compact yet robust profile. The rifle is equipped with a prominent scope mounted on the top rail, suggesting it is optimized for precision shooting at distance. The stock is integrated into the rear of the body, with a contoured cheek rest and a solid buttplate for stability. The barrel is long and slender, extending forward from a substantial handguard, and the overall construction appears to be a mix of metal and polymer materials. The magazine is box-shaped and detachable, and the rifle's angular, futuristic styling makes it suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A modern bullpup rifle with a black, gray, and red color scheme, featuring a scope, detachable box magazine, and a sleek, tactical design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the scope, bullpup stock, and detailed red accents.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the slim profile, scope alignment, and the compactness of the bullpup configuration.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the magazine, trigger, and the integrated stock with red and gray details.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view emphasizing the undercarriage, handguard, and the alignment of the barrel and stock.
